hero.h1: One team for everything you build next
hero.subhead: Thraxel designs, builds, and runs your technology: AI agents working around the clock, full web and product builds, and automations wired into the stack you already have.

features.heading: From idea to running system
features.subhead: One partner for the build, the automation, and the long-run improvement of your technology.

items.title: Websites, products, portals
items.body: Full builds designed to convert, shipped fast, and wired into your operations from day one.

items.title: AI agents on your stack
items.body: Always-on agents that watch, respond, follow up, and learn from your data around the clock.

items.title: Systems that improve
items.body: Deployments surface suggestions your team approves, so the system gets smarter every month.

rows.title: An AI workforce inside your product
rows.body: Persistent agents run long tasks continuously: monitoring, follow-up, browser automation, and integrations, configured to your industry and your data. Your team approves what ships; the agents do the work.

rows.title: Full-stack delivery, one partner
rows.body: Sites, CRM and pipeline automation, media and creative, systems integration. Bring the project, the problem, or just the idea; if it is technical, we can build and run it.

developer.heading: Wire Thraxel into your stack
developer.subhead: Agents drop into your existing codebase and tools. Create, configure, and monitor deployments through a small, predictable API.
developer.caption: Works with your APIs, webhooks, and existing services.

specimen.heading: Your product, your brand
specimen.subhead: Everything we build picks up your color, type, and controls, so it feels like yours from day one.
specimen.note: Shown in this brand's design language.

stats.label: Thraxel in production
stats.note: Across active Thraxel deployments. SOC 2 and HIPAA compliant infrastructure.

testimonial.quote: Thraxel gave us a technical team that never sleeps. The agents handle the follow-up and monitoring; we approve, and the system keeps getting better.
testimonial.name: Realtor platform deployment

caseCard.label: Deployment story
caseCard.text: An always-on assistant handling listing monitoring, client follow-up, and media for a realtor platform.

quote2.quote: It replaced three tools and a part-time hire in the first month.
quote2.name: E-commerce deployment

pricing.heading: Engagements that fit how you work
pricing.subhead: Own it outright, run it managed, or scope something custom.
pricing.note: Every engagement includes direct access to the team.

items.a: Discovery starts the same week. Most deployments go from kickoff to a running system in a few weeks.

items.q: Do you work inside our existing stack?
items.a: Yes. Thraxel drops into your codebase, your APIs, and the tools your team already uses. Nothing gets ripped out or replaced unless you want it gone.
Deployments run on SOC 2 and HIPAA compliant infrastructure, with your team approving every change that ships.
Websites, AI agents, automations, integrations, media. If it is technical, bring it to us.

cta.heading: Tell us what you need built
cta.subhead: Bring the project, the problem, or just the idea.

form.heading: Start a conversation
form.subhead: Tell us about your project and the team will follow up within a day.
form.note: A demo form. Nothing is sent.

footer.description: AI agents, web builds, and automation for companies in any industry.
